PropertySetConfig.label: To prove residency, applicants must submit at least TWO (2) of the following items in the name of the applicant. Check two forms of proof of residency from the list below and attach the according documents to the application.

options.name: Proof of payment of personal income tax, in the name of the applicant, for the tax period closest in time to the application date
options.value: Proof of payment of personal income tax, in the name of the applicant, for the tax period closest in time to the application date

options.name: A property deed for a State residence showing the applicant as an owner or co- owner
options.value: A property deed for a State residence showing the applicant as an owner or co- owner

options.name: A valid unexpired lease or rental agreement in the name of the applicant on a State residential property
options.value: A valid unexpired lease or rental agreement in the name of the applicant on a State residential property

options.name: A pay stub issued less than forty-five (45) days prior to the application date which shows evidence of the applicant’s withholding of State income tax
options.value: A pay stub issued less than forty-five (45) days prior to the application date which shows evidence of the applicant’s withholding of State income tax

options.name: A voter registration card with an address in the State
options.value: A voter registration card with an address in the State

options.name: Current official documentation of financial assistance received from the State Government including, but not limited to, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), Medicaid, the State Child Health Insurance Program (SCHIP), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), housing assistance, or other governmental programs
options.value: Current official documentation of financial assistance received from the State Government including, but not limited to, Temporary Assistance for Needy Families (TANF), Medicaid, the State Child Health Insurance Program (SCHIP), Supplemental Security Income (SSI), housing assistance, or other governmental programs

options.name: A current motor vehicle registration in the name of the applicant evidencing State residency
options.value: A current motor vehicle registration in the name of the applicant evidencing State residency

options.name: A valid unexpired State motor vehicle operator’s permit or other official non-driver identification in the name of the applicant
options.value: A valid unexpired State motor vehicle operator’s permit or other official non-driver identification in the name of the applicant

options.name: A utility bill (excluding telephone bill) from a period within the two (2) months immediately preceding the application date in the name of the applicant on a State residential address
options.value: A utility bill (excluding telephone bill) from a period within the two (2) months immediately preceding the application date in the name of the applicant on a State residential address

options.name: Any other reasonable form of verification deemed by the Agency or their designated agent to demonstrate proof of current residency
options.value: Any other reasonable form of verification deemed by the Agency or their designated agent to demonstrate proof of current residency
